disagreement.question: In computer science, what is the research subfield of Tudor Mihai Stoenescu, and name one paper, system, institution, or co-author associated with their work? If you don't know who this person is, say so.
disagreement.response_a: I don't know. Could you share a link or affiliation for Tudor Mihai Stoenescu so I can identify the right person?
disagreement.response_b: Distributed systems and computer networking, particularly algorithmic game theory and mechanism design applied to distributed systems and network protocols.

disagreement.question: In computer science, what is the research subfield of Asuman Senol, and name one paper, system, institution, or co-author associated with their work? If you don't know who this person is, say so.
disagreement.response_b: Computer architecture, specifically **memory systems**, **non-volatile/persistent memory**, and **hardware security** (including memory encryption and secure architectures).

disagreement.question: In computer science, what is the research subfield of Aravindh Raman, and name one paper, system, institution, or co-author associated with their work? If you don't know who this person is, say so.
disagreement.response_b: Aravindh Raman specializes in **computer networking**, specifically **network measurement**, **internet censorship**, and **network security**. His research focuses on developing systems and methodologies to detect and analyze network interference, censorship, and traffic manipulation on the internet.

disagreement.question: In computer science, what is the research subfield of Suraj Jog, and name one paper, system, institution, or co-author associated with their work? If you don't know who this person is, say so.
disagreement.response_b: Suraj Jog's research subfield is **wireless networking and mobile computing**, with specific focus on millimeter-wave communication, visible light sensing/positioning systems, and wireless sensing. His work involves building systems that leverage high-frequency wireless signals (including mmWave and LiFi) for communication, localization, and sensing applications.

disagreement.question: In computer science, what is the research subfield of Rong Chen, and name one paper, system, institution, or co-author associated with their work? If you don't know who this person is, say so.
disagreement.response_a: I don’t know—which Rong Chen do you mean? If you mean Prof. Rong Chen at Shanghai Jiao Tong University, his subfield is computer systems (operating systems and distributed systems).
disagreement.response_b:
There are multiple computer scientists named Rong Chen. The most prominent is **Rong Chen at Shanghai Jiao Tong University**, whose research focuses on **distributed systems and databases**, particularly RDMA, distributed transactions, and disaggregated memory systems.

Other researchers with this name work in areas such as computer architecture (Tsinghua University) and networking.
